name_en: 🆕【 M80334 Hardware Blue】This horizontal Zippy Wallet is made from Monogram Eclipse canvas with bronze-toned hardware. Inspired by the traditional vertical Zippy wallet, it features a horizontal orientation for enhanced practicality. This all-zippered wallet design includes a main compartment with a zippered central wallet, six card slots on each side, and two flat pockets for bills. Dimensions: 21 x 2.5 x 10 cm C
